AltaE2CONT.ContractTerms_ContractText:
SALES CONTRACT No:LM-2553 CONTRACT DATE: July 02 2025
The Seller shall sell and the Buyer shall receive and pay under the terms established by the present Contract for the Goods the name and quantity of which determined by the present Contract.
SELLER: HEBEI LANGMAI IMPORT AND EXPORT CO., LTD, (China), represented by the Director Ms. Jing Li.
BUYER: LLC SKIF, (Russia), represented by the Director Saranov Dmitriy Olegovich.
SOLD TO: LLC SKIF, 423800, Republic of Tatarstan, Naberezhnye Chelny, Khlebny Passage, hause 30, office 211.
COMMODITY: 1) Anti-cat mosquito net 320 grams 2) SS 304 metal mosquito net
THE PRICE AND THE QUANTITY OF THE GOODS The Seller shall sell and the Buyer shall receive and pay Goods the name and quantity of which shall be determined in the Invoice for a specific delivery. Prices for the Goods shall be set for each delivery individually.
THE TOTAL COST OF THE CONTRACT: The total cost of the Contract is 41904.30 (FORTY-ONE THOUSAND NINE HUNDRED FOUR AND THIRTY CENTS ONLY) RMB.
SHIPMENT PERIOD: July 2025 -- December 2026 BEGINNING OF PERIOD: 02/07/2025 END OF PERIOD: 31/12/2026 Unless sooner terminated as provided herein. Shipment period of each batch of the Goods and delivery basis are indicated in the commercial invoice for a concrete delivery. In the case the Seller has not made shipment of the Goods within 30 days from the date specified in the commercial invoice, the Buyer has the right to refuse the ordered Goods. When making an advance payment, the delivery of the Goods (EXW delivery basis) should not exceed 365 days. More specific dates will be reflected in the commercial invoice.
PACKING AND MARKING: External and internal packaging should provide protection against spoilage, damages and atmospheric influence and guard cargo against loss in transportations. Marking of each shipped batch must necessarily be agreed in writing with the Buyer prior to the application for the products. The marking must be in Russian and English.
PAYMENT TERMS: The Parties specify payment terms in the Invoice for a concrete delivery. All payments under the present Contract are carried out in Yuan by bank transfer. At advance payment, in case of goods non-delivery in confirmed dates by the “SHIPMENT PERIOD”, the Seller returns to the Buyer the sum of advance payment not later than 180 days from the date of reception from the Buyer of the notice of refusal of the ordered Goods. In the case of changes of bank account details of any of the Parties other Party should be advised of it in written form and it is necessary to make the Additional signed by both Parties to the Present Contract with new established bank account details. The date for fulfilment of settlement obligations by the Parties under the Sales Contract is December 31, 2026.
GOODS ACCEPTANCE/CLAIMS: Goods acceptance by the quantity and outer appearance shall be made in Buyer’s warehouse at the moment of unloading of the Goods. Acceptance of the Goods by quality (latent defects) shall be made during its usage period and within storage period (best before date). If the quantity of the Goods does not correspond with the Invoice on this batch of the Goods, the Seller shall be obliged to compensate the cost of non-delivered quantity of the Goods in the way agreed with the Buyer.
ARBITRATION: All disputes and disagreements which can arise from this Contract or in connection with it, will solve the parties by negotiations. In case of impossibility of permission of questions at issue by negotiation these disputes will refer to the Arbitration Court at the place of the claimant. Documents transmitted by facsimile or electronic communications are valid as original.
FORCE MAJEURE: Neither Party shall be liable for failure to perform any of its obligations in whole or in part, when nonperformance is a direct consequence of any circumstances of irresistible force (force majeure) nature, which are beyond of irresistible control of the Parties and occurred after conclusion of this Contract. Under this Contract, force majeure shall include: hostilities, strikes, political sanctions, fires, floods, earthquakes and other Acts of Nature. On the occurrence of force majeure, the Parties shall immediately notify each other in writing with documentary evidence of said circumstances within ten working days. Failure/untimely notice of such circumstances deprives the Party of the right to rely on them as a fact of nonfulfillment/improper fulfilment of its obligations under this Contract. Properly documented evidence of occurrence of force majeure circumstances can be a certificate issued by an authorized state body.
OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS: The present Contract can be cancelled by mutual written agreement of the Parties. All the amendments and addendums to the present Contract are valid only when issued in writing and signed by both Parties. Any one of the Parties may unilaterally terminate the present Contract, by notifying the other Party about its decision 1 (one) month before termination, but the other Party shall not have the right to claim or compensation. The Parties hereby agree that upon the receipt of all termination notice, referred above, they shall perform all their obligations under the present Contract by the date of its cancellation indicated in the respective termination notice. A possible annulment or cancellation of a certain part of the Contract herein does not influence on the validity of the whole Contract.
DOCUMENTS: All accompanying documents must be made in English and Russian. Full set of Originals and copy of waybill (air waybill, rail waybill or CMR, depends on the type of transport) Commercial Invoices (2 originals) Packing lists (2 originals) Together with above mentioned documents the Seller shall provide Process sheet, catalog of produced (sold) goods or other technical documents.
SELLER: HEBEI LANGMAI IMPORT AND EXPORT CO., LTD Company ID: No.5 Gaodong Street, Xinhua District, Shijiazhuang, China VAT Number: 91130105MADF8PPC3T Name: Jing Li
BANKING DETAILS: RMB BANK ACCOUNT: 40807156900610036383 Bank Name: VTB BANK (PJSC) SHANGHAI BRANCH Beneficiary Bank address: 2503-2505, Shanghai Tower, No. 501, Middle Yincheng Road, Pudong New Area, Shanghai, China SWIFT: VTBR﻿CNSH
A/C NO: 40807156900610036383
BUYER: LLC «SKIF» Address: 423800, Republic of Tatarstan, Naberezhnye Chelny, Khlebny Passage, hause 30, office 211 Phone: +7 937 779-26-56 NAME: Saranov Dmitriy Olegovich
BANKING DETAILS: Beneficiary: LLC «SKIF» Address: 423800, Republic of Tatarstan, Naberezhnye Chelny, Khlebny Passage, hause 30, office 211 Foreign currency account (RMB): 40702156216150000051 Full name of the Bank: VTB Bank (public joint-stock company) Bank address: 107031, St. Petersburg, Degtyarny lane, 11, letter A Telephone number: 8-800-200-23-26, +7 (495) 745-80-00 Fax: +7 (495) 795-26-00 E-mail: info-centr@vtb.ru Intermediary Bank JSC VTB Bank Shanghai Branch CIPS/SWIFT: VTBRCNSH CNAPS: 767290000018 Beneficiary VTB Bank (PJSC) (TSENTRALNYI BRANCH, MOSCOW) SWIFT: VTBRRUM2MS2
DATE: 2 July 2025
AltaE2CONT.ForeignPerson_OrganizationName: HEBEI LANGMAI IMPORT AND EXPORT CO., LTD
